title: Kadachira Sri Thrikkapalam Siva Temple
tagline: Kadachira Sri Thrikkapalam Siva Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

heroImage.alt: Kadachira Sri Thrikkapalam Siva Temple, Kerala

overview.short: Kadachira Sri Thrikkapalam Siva Temple, an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva is situated on the banks of the Anjarakandi River at Peralassery of Kannur District in Keral
overview.description: Kadachira Sri Thrikkapalam Siva Temple, an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva is situated on the banks of the Anjarakandi River at Peralassery of Kannur District in Kerala state in India. The temple is the abode of Dakshinamurthy (is an aspect of the Lord Shiva as a guru/teacher of all types of knowledge). The unique feature of the temple is that there are two idols of equally important in two facets. The both deity of Thrikkapalam temple is Dakshinamurthy and are located in separate sanctum sanctorums facing east.

topPlaces.name: Mavilayi
topPlaces.description: Mavilayi is a census town in Kannur district in the Indian state of Kerala. Situated in Peralasseri Panchayath on Kannur-Kuthuparamba State Highway, 15 km away from Kannur Town.

topPlaces.name: Kadachira
topPlaces.description: Kadachira is a census town and a suburb of kannur city in Kannur district in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Oorpazhachi Kavu
topPlaces.description: Sree Oorpazhachi Kavu is a Hindu temple in the Edakkad grama panchayat in Kannur District of Kerala state in southern India.

topPlaces.name: Edakkad
topPlaces.description: Edakkad is a village in Kannur city in Kannur District of Kerala state, in India.

topPlaces.name: Muzhappilangad
topPlaces.description: Muzhappilangad (മുഴപ്പിലങ്ങാട്) is a coastal census town in Kannur Municipal Corporation in Kannur district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is a suburb of Kannur city.

topPlaces.name: Dharmadom
topPlaces.description: Dharmadom or Dharmadam is a Census Town in Kannur district in the state of Kerala, India. This town is located in between Anjarakandi River and Ummanchira River, and Palayad town and Arabian Sea.

topPlaces.name: Peralasseri
topPlaces.description: Peralasseri is a census town and Panchayat headquarters in Kannur district in the Indian state of Kerala, situated on the Kannur-Kuthuparamba SH 38, about 16 km south east of Kannur city and 10 km west of Kuthuparamba town, on the banks of Anajarakandy river.

topPlaces.name: Palayad
topPlaces.description: Palayad is a census town in Thalassery Taluk in the Indian state of Kerala.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kadachira Sri Thrikkapalam Siva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kadachira Sri Thrikkapalam Siva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kadachira Sri Thrikkapalam Siva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (94 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (134 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kadachira Sri Thrikkapalam Siva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kadachira Sri Thrikkapalam Siva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kadachira Sri Thrikkapalam Siva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Kadachira Sri Thrikkapalam Siva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kadachira Sri Thrikkapalam Siva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mavilayi, Kadachira, Oorpazhachi Kavu, Edakkad, Muzhappilangad.
